title: Village Minimum Register Set (VMRS)
disclaimer: ISV Tech Comm working subset — NOT an IEC or DLMS UA published profile. Validate OBIS-to-COSEM mappings with each vendor before procurement.
standard: OBIS identification per IEC 62056-6-1 where noted; COSEM mappings per DLMS UA Blue Book where noted
methodology: Registers chosen from (1) universal billing/t metrology codes in IEC 62056-6-1, (2) objects commonly exposed on STS/DLMS prepay meters in vendor literature and utility AMI practice, (3) ISV field requirements from Tech Comm notes. Tier C entries need vendor confirmation.
summary: Appendix register checklist for northbound MQTT payloads. Transport (DLMS, OEM RF, STS) stays vendor-specific below the edge gateway; tier A OBIS keys are IEC-standard; tier B requires vendor ICD mapping.

certaintyLegend.A: Standard OBIS code — defined in IEC 62056-6-1 (energy, metrology, clock)
certaintyLegend.B: Common COSEM/AMI practice — widely implemented on prepay/DLMS meters; exact attribute mapping varies by ICD
certaintyLegend.C: ISV working proposal — logical need confirmed by operators; OBIS assignment or mandatory flag not standardized

registers.name: Active energy import (total)
registers.notes: Universal revenue billing register on DLMS meters worldwide

registers.name: Active energy export (total)
registers.notes: Include only when net-metering or DER export settlement is in scope

registers.name: Instantaneous active power import
sources: IEC 62056-6-1 — OBIS code 1.7.0 (instantaneous active import power)
registers.notes: Theft detection, load profiling; interval is operator policy not OBIS-defined

registers.name: Instantaneous voltage (L1)
registers.notes: Single-phase village feeders; use 52.7.0/72.7.0 if L2/L3 exist

registers.name: Supply frequency
registers.notes: Optional on stable single-phase rural feeders

registers.name: Billing period counter
registers.notes: NOT meter serial — see 0.0.96.1.1.255 / device ID alternatives in tier B
alternatives: 0.0.96.1.1.255 — device ID / serial on many COSEM ICDs

registers.name: Device ID / serial number (typical COSEM)
sources: DLMS UA COSEM identification objects — common ICD pattern
Inhemeter i310 brochure cites OBIS/IEC62056-21 optical read — ISV vendor study [s15]
registers.notes: Exact logical name varies by manufacturer; northbound may use meterSerial field instead of OBIS when ICD differs
alternatives: 96.1.0 if vendor maps serial incorrectly — verify in ICD

registers.name: Internal operating / alarm status
registers.notes: Bit meanings are manufacturer-specific — require ICD tamper table, do not assume cross-vendor bits

registers.name: Remaining credit / prepayment balance
sources: Common COSEM prepayment/account objects on STS-capable meters
IEC 62055 STS defines token transfer — not OBIS-native; credit display mapping is vendor ICD
registers.notes: STS vending path may not expose this northbound until DLMS read exists; CIU display may be only source
alternatives: Account/credit objects in Blue Book prepayment interface — ask vendor for logical name

registers.name: Disconnect control (typical COSEM logical name)
sources: DLMS UA COSEM — disconnect control class default logical name pattern
registers.notes: Previous VMRS draft used 96.11.1 — that was imprecise; use vendor ICD. Northbound enum: connected | disconnected
alternatives: 96.11.x variants appear in some vendor docs — always verify

registers.name: Last token / transfer event register
sources: Observed in prepay meter OBIS tables (vendor-specific)
ISV STS audit requirement from Tech Comm notes
registers.notes: Logical name not standardized across vendors — include if ICD exposes token audit

excludedByDesign: Full Profile Generic (class 7) load profile buffers — utility VEE, not village minimum unless theft analytics require intervals
Full COSEM ICD (100s of objects) — utility certification scope
STS key management (STSA/KMC) — separate trust domain from register reads
SunSpec inverter models — parallel DER track, not revenue VMRS
openQuestions: Field validation: which VMRS OBIS codes are readable on Donsun DS1000, Inhemeter i310, Calin CAM168-G via optical/DLMS in ISV target deployments
Harmonize disconnect and credit logical names into northbound JSON when vendor OBIS differs
Community review against DLMS UA prepayment profile when available to team
